figures.caption: Fig. 4: Qualitative cross-sensor comparison between EMIT and S5P for BD6. All images are visualised by averaging radiance across the spectral channels
TABLE IV: GT-SHR quantitive results across all the spectral bands. For each band and metric, the best results are shown in bold and the second-best are underlined

Fig. 3: GT-SHR qualitative evaluation through Unet-S5P-1M. Each spectral band is trained independently. The first and second rows show SHR outputs for BD2 and BD5 over the same spatial region, illustrating consistent reconstruction of sharp spatial details across bands

TABLE III: LR-HR quantitative results across all spectral bands. For each band and each metric, the best results for each training setting (SL and SSL) are shown in bold and the second-best are underlined
Fig. 1: Overview of the proposed Unet-S5P architecture and and its building blocks, illustrating the residual learning strategy for refining the interpolated input
